title: neoblakea ecuadorensis
intro: Neoblakea ecuadorensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Ecuador. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Neoblakea ecuadorensis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves may also be used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves.
